title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IRCTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!
